_docs: Each check pings hc-ping.com at the END of a successful run. If pings stop, healthchecks.io emails peter@lifestyledesignrealty.com automatically.

nightly_health.description: Nightly Health System (4am CT) — self-healing orchestrator

daily_automation.description: Daily Automation Run (7am CT) — pond nurture + agent bots

_setup_instructions: 1. Create a free account at https://healthchecks.io
2. Create a project, set notification email to peter@lifestyledesignrealty.com
3. Get your project's Ping Key from Settings > Ping Key
4. Set it in this file's 'ping_key' field
5. The system will auto-create checks on first ping using slug + create=1
6. Set each check's period to 25h and grace to 2h in the healthchecks.io UI
